message:
refactor(workspace): extract forensics+rehearsal evidence modules to audit-types crate (ft-mq7fl / ft-8nqx0 Phase 3)

Phase 3 of the staged extraction. Continues the Phase 1 work
(ft-rqu5e, 73201d5ce) by lifting three more leaf-clean modules out of
`frankenterm-core` into `frankenterm-core-audit-types`. All three are
already at zero `crate::*` deps per the ft-8nqx0 boundary scan, so the
move is mechanical with public-API preservation.

Modules moved (frankenterm-core/src/ → frankenterm-core-audit-types/src/):

- `migration_rehearsal.rs` (~1,444 LOC) — migration rehearsal scenarios,
  execution, drill metrics, reports.
- `cutover_evidence.rs` (~1,979 LOC) — go/no-go evidence package,
  prerequisites, regression gates, risk registry, soak outcomes.
- `canary_rehearsal.rs` (~1,833 LOC) — canary rollout rehearsal +
  fail-safe drill modeling.

Module wiring:

- New `pub mod canary_rehearsal;`, `pub mod cutover_evidence;`, and
  `pub mod migration_rehearsal;` in `audit-types/src/lib.rs`.
- `frankenterm-core/src/lib.rs` re-exports each via
  `pub use frankenterm_core_audit_types::{canary_rehearsal,
  cutover_evidence, migration_rehearsal};` so existing
  `crate::*` and `frankenterm_core::*` paths continue resolving for
  internal users (`runtime_performance_contract.rs` →
  `crate::cutover_evidence::BenchmarkComparison`,
  `soak_confidence_gate.rs` → `crate::cutover_evidence::SoakOutcome`)
  and the proptests
  (`proptest_migration_rehearsal`, `proptest_cutover_evidence`,
  `proptest_canary_rehearsal`).

What stays in `frankenterm-core` (Phase 3 was scoped to leaf-clean
moves only):

- `resize_crash_forensics.rs` — depends on `crate::resize_scheduler`
  for live process-state snapshots (capture hook on
  `crash::write_crash_bundle`). The proposal calls for the DTOs to
  move once a scheduler-snapshot adapter exists; the operational hook
  itself stays. Filed as deferred work in the audit-types lib doc.

Verification:

- `cargo check -p frankenterm-core-audit-types` → clean (2.29s).
- `cargo check -p frankenterm-core --no-default-features` → clean
  (51.53s).
- `cargo check --workspace` (default features) → clean (1m28s).
- `cargo check -p frankenterm-core --test proptest_migration_rehearsal
  --test proptest_cutover_evidence --test proptest_canary_rehearsal
  --no-default-features` → clean (proptests resolve via the re-export).

Phase 4-6 deferred to existing follow-on beads ft-xcsm0 (retention
lifecycle), ft-4ses2 (storage audit boundary), ft-nsoxc (ARS
decoupling). Phase 2 (ft-kldww) audit engines partly pre-seeded in
this crate by Phase 1 + ongoing linter work
(`policy_decision_log_engine`, `recorder_audit_engine`).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
